channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car hit warning sign, 14th July
item.description:
Warning sign indicating sharp turn has been knocked down. Drivers not used to area will not realise with potential to cause accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on street, 14th July
item.description:
Please can you collect?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree, 14th July
item.description:
Caller says that the branch of a tree has snapped and is about to fall,= so obstructing traffic and dangerous to passer by and cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldegrave Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal cash for cars poster, 14th July
item.description:
Illegal poster cash for cars on the lamppost.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and weeds along the street, 14th July
item.description:
The whole of Mauritius Road is disgusting. We pay enough council tax yet the street isn’t clean or weeded. It looks like the bronx right now, absolutely disgusting
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 14th July
item.description:
Rubbish in hedgerow alongside road and retail park. Regular problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bryn-Y-Mawr Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped, 14th July
item.description:
As above outside no 31

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Huxley Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown shrubs - hazard, 14th July
item.description:
I would like to report overgrown shrubs and tree branches at the end of Sewell Road, Abbey Wood, SE2. The vegetation is protruding into the road, narrowing the carriageway and scratching passing vehicles. It presents a hazard for motorists and should be cut back as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ampleforth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti On Wall 43-49 Wolvercote Rd - 2nd Time Reporting, 14th July
item.description:
Squatters in the Lesnes Estate have sprayed large and offensive graffiti on 43-49 Wolvetcote Rd wall. I previously reported this on 12th July and was sent an update that the graffiti had been removed. It clearly has not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolvercote Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, trip hazard on pavements, 14th July
item.description:
Left on corner of upper wickham lane and entrance to Springfield Road Welling Kent outside Barker and Bennell podiatrist clinic last week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking slab, 14th July
item.description:
The slab outside the station door rocks when walked on

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adelaide Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley abandoned outside 157 Choumert Road, 14th July
item.description:
The trolley was abandoned on the road last night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Choumert Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat and multiple rats running around, 14th July
item.description:
We thought they were squirrels but we looked closer and they were rats and there were dead rats too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household items, 14th July
item.description:
People are dumping household items in the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Hart Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another fly tip here, 14th July
item.description:
There is something new here every few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous paint tins dumped, 14th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped around eight paint tins outside the bin shed. Was not the tenants who use the bin shed!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light pole is leaning, 14th July
item.description:
The street light opposite 9 shaw road is leaning forward and is at an angle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Shaw Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed frame, 14th July
item.description:
Mattress and bed frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 14th July
item.description:
There is a large flytip of black bin bags and detritus at the alley way entrance between 33 and 35 bourdon road se 20
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourdon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Symes Mews just off Camden High Street, 14th July
item.description:
I live on the other side of Symes Mews and noticed this morning the lantern has fallen to one side and looks like it could fall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Camden High Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
